title: astragalus bicolor subsp. karputanus
intro: Astragalus bicolor subsp. karputanus, also known as the Karput Astragalus, is a subspecies of the Astragalus bicolor plant, which belongs to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help to modulate the body's response to stress and promote overall health. The Karput Astragalus has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including respiratory issues and inflammation. Astragalus bicolor subsp. karputanus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or supplement to take advantage of its health benefits, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
